/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG CMakeFiles/test_hgr_render.dir/hgr_render_smoke_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hgr_render.dir/__/Apple2Display.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hgr_render.dir/__/M6502.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hgr_render.dir/__/Memory.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hgr_render.dir/__/SlotBus.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hgr_render.dir/__/CassetteDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hgr_render.dir/__/AudioDevice.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hgr_render.dir/__/RomLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hgr_render.dir/__/SnapshotIO.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_hgr_render.dir/__/SpeakerDevice.cpp.o -o test_hgr_render  -ldl -lm
